mapper.sql: SELECT data_id, grid_code, indicator_code, normalized_value, create_time FROM jw_grid_data_normalized
mapper.select: SELECT d.data_id, d.grid_code, d.indicator_code, d.normalized_value, d.create_time FROM jw_grid_data_normalized d JOIN jw_grid_meta m ON d.grid_code = m.grid_code WHERE m.city = #{city} ORDER BY d.grid_code, d.indicator_code

SELECT d.data_id, d.grid_code, d.indicator_code, d.normalized_value, d.create_time FROM jw_grid_data_normalized d JOIN jw_grid_meta m ON d.grid_code = m.grid_code WHERE m.city = #{city} ORDER BY d.grid_code, d.indicator_code
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_grid_data_normalized WHERE data_id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_grid_data_normalized ( grid_code, indicator_code, normalized_value, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.gridCode}, #{item.indicatorCode}, #{item.normalizedValue}, sysdate())

INSERT INTO jw_grid_data_normalized ( grid_code, indicator_code, normalized_value, create_time ) VALUES ( #{gridCode}, #{indicatorCode}, #{normalizedValue}, sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE normalized_value = VALUES(normalized_value)

INSERT INTO jw_grid_data_normalized ( grid_code, indicator_code, normalized_value, create_time ) VALUES ( #{gridCode}, #{indicatorCode}, #{normalizedValue}, sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE normalized_value = VALUES(normalized_value)
